languages.text: Смерть разведчика стала лишь первой среди многих — бойцы, шедшие следом за ним, не успели отступить вовремя, и их кровь окрасила черный камень под нашими ногами в ржаво-алый. Лишь залп плазменных ружей, выпущенный шедшими позади техножрецами флагмана, заставил всех замереть на месте.

The scout's death was but the first of many, as the soldiers following him did not fall back in time. Their blood turned the black stone under our feet a rusty scarlet. Only a salvo from the plasma guns of the flagship's Tech-Priests, who were marching in the rear, made everyone freeze in place.
languages.original_text: Смерть разведчика стала лишь первой среди многих — бойцы, шедшие следом за ним, не успели отступить вовремя, и их кровь окрасила черный камень под нашими ногами в ржаво-алый. Лишь залп плазменных ружей, выпущенный шедшими позади техножрецами флагмана, заставил всех замереть на месте.

traits.locale_text: The scout's death was but the first of many, as the soldiers following him did not fall back in time. Their blood turned the black stone under our feet a rusty scarlet. Only a salvo from the plasma guns of the flagship's Tech-Priests, who were marching in the rear, made everyone freeze in place.

The scout's death was but the first of many, as the soldiers who were following him did not fall back in time. Their blood turned the dark metal under our feet a rusty scarlet. Only a salvo from the plasma guns of the Mechanicus, who were marching in the very rear, made everyone freeze in place.

The scout's death was but the first of many, as the soldiers following him did not fall back in time. Their blood turned the dark metal under our feet a rusty scarlet. Only a salvo from the plasma guns of the Adeptus Mechanicus, who were marching in the rear, made everyone freeze in place.

The scout's death was but the first of many, as the soldiers following him did not fall back in time. Their blood turned the dark metal under our feet a rusty scarlet. Only a salvo from the plasma guns of the Adeptus Mechanicus, who were marching in the rear, made everyone freeze in place.

The scout's death was but the first of many, as the soldiers following him did not fall back in time. Their blood turned the black stone under our feet a rusty scarlet. Only a salvo from the plasma guns of the flagship's Tech-Priests, who were marching in the rear, made everyone freeze in place.

languages.text: La muerte del explorador fue la primera de muchas, ya que los soldados que lo seguían no retrocedieron a tiempo. Su sangre tiñó la piedra negra que pisábamos de un color escarlata oxidado. Solo una andanada de los rifles de plasma de los tecnosacerdotes de la nave insignia, situados en la retaguardia, hizo que todos se detuvieran.
languages.original_text: The scout's death was but the first of many, as the soldiers following him did not fall back in time. Their blood turned the black stone under our feet a rusty scarlet. Only a salvo from the plasma guns of the flagship's Tech-Priests, who were marching in the rear, made everyone freeze in place.

traits.locale_text: La muerte del explorador fue la primera de muchas, ya que los soldados que lo seguían no retrocedieron a tiempo. Su sangre tiñó la piedra negra que pisábamos de un color escarlata oxidado. Solo una andanada de los rifles de plasma de los tecnosacerdotes de la nave insignia, situados en la retaguardia, hizo que todos se detuvieran.

languages.text: La mort de l'éclaireur ne fut que la première d'une longue série, car les soldats qui le suivaient ne réussirent pas à se replier à temps. Leur sang vint teinter la pierre sombre sous nos pieds d'une couleur rouille. Seule une salve tirée par les canons à plasma des technoprêtres du vaisseau, qui marchaient en queue de colonne, obligea tout le monde à se figer sur place.
languages.original_text: The scout's death was but the first of many, as the soldiers following him did not fall back in time. Their blood turned the black stone under our feet a rusty scarlet. Only a salvo from the plasma guns of the flagship's Tech-Priests, who were marching in the rear, made everyone freeze in place.

traits.locale_text: La mort de l'éclaireur ne fut que la première d'une longue série, car les soldats qui le suivaient ne réussirent pas à se replier à temps. Leur sang vint teinter la pierre sombre sous nos pieds d'une couleur rouille. Seule une salve tirée par les canons à plasma des technoprêtres du vaisseau, qui marchaient en queue de colonne, obligea tout le monde à se figer sur place.

languages.text: 侦察员的死亡只是开始。紧随其后的士兵来不及后撤，一个接一个倒下，他们的鲜血将脚下的黑色石头染成锈红。直到行军在后的旗舰技术神甫一轮等离子齐射，才让所有人停在原地。
languages.original_text: The scout's death was but the first of many, as the soldiers following him did not fall back in time. Their blood turned the black stone under our feet a rusty scarlet. Only a salvo from the plasma guns of the flagship's Tech-Priests, who were marching in the rear, made everyone freeze in place.

traits.locale_text: 侦察员的死亡只是开始。紧随其后的士兵来不及后撤，一个接一个倒下，他们的鲜血将脚下的黑色石头染成锈红。直到行军在后的旗舰技术神甫一轮等离子齐射，才让所有人停在原地。

languages.text: Der Späher starb nur als Erster von vielen, da sich die Soldaten, die ihm folgten, nicht rechtzeitig zurückziehen konnten. Ihr Blut färbte den schwarzen Stein unter unseren Füßen rot. Erst eine Salve der Plasmawerfer der von hinten vorrückenden Techpriester des Flaggschiffs ließ alle Anwesenden erstarren.
languages.original_text: The scout's death was but the first of many, as the soldiers following him did not fall back in time. Their blood turned the black stone under our feet a rusty scarlet. Only a salvo from the plasma guns of the flagship's Tech-Priests, who were marching in the rear, made everyone freeze in place.

traits.locale_text: Der Späher starb nur als Erster von vielen, da sich die Soldaten, die ihm folgten, nicht rechtzeitig zurückziehen konnten. Ihr Blut färbte den schwarzen Stein unter unseren Füßen rot. Erst eine Salve der Plasmawerfer der von hinten vorrückenden Techpriester des Flaggschiffs ließ alle Anwesenden erstarren.

languages.text: Keşif kolunun ölümü sadece ilk kayıptı. Devamındaki askerler, zamanında geri çekilemedi. Kanları, ayaklarımızın altındaki kara taşı paslı bir kızıla boyadı. Sadece arkadan yürüyen sancak gemisi Tekno Rahiplerinin plazma silahlarından atılan bir salvo, herkesi oldukları yerde dondurabildi.
languages.original_text: The scout's death was but the first of many, as the soldiers following him did not fall back in time. Their blood turned the black stone under our feet a rusty scarlet. Only a salvo from the plasma guns of the flagship's Tech-Priests, who were marching in the rear, made everyone freeze in place.

traits.locale_text: Keşif kolunun ölümü sadece ilk kayıptı. Devamındaki askerler, zamanında geri çekilemedi. Kanları, ayaklarımızın altındaki kara taşı paslı bir kızıla boyadı. Sadece arkadan yürüyen sancak gemisi Tekno Rahiplerinin plazma silahlarından atılan bir salvo, herkesi oldukları yerde dondurabildi.

languages.text: 偵察兵の死は、多くの死の始まりに過ぎなかった。彼に続く兵士たちは、撤退を遅らせ、彼らの血は、我々の足元を覆う黒い石を錆びた赤色に変えた。後方から進軍する旗艦のテクプリストが放ったプラズマ銃の連射が、全員を凍りつかせた。
languages.original_text: The scout's death was but the first of many, as the soldiers following him did not fall back in time. Their blood turned the black stone under our feet a rusty scarlet. Only a salvo from the plasma guns of the flagship's Tech-Priests, who were marching in the rear, made everyone freeze in place.

traits.locale_text: 偵察兵の死は、多くの死の始まりに過ぎなかった。彼に続く兵士たちは、撤退を遅らせ、彼らの血は、我々の足元を覆う黒い石を錆びた赤色に変えた。後方から進軍する旗艦のテクプリストが放ったプラズマ銃の連射が、全員を凍りつかせた。
